name: Margaret Chen
message: I'm interested in acquiring one of the Cube Series works for our living room. We have a modern interior with high ceilings and concrete floors — the cubes look like they would be perfect. Can you share what is currently available and pricing?

name: David Reinholt
message: We are specifying art for a hotel lobby project in Austin. Looking for 3-4 large format works and potentially some cubes for the bar area. Budget is flexible for the right work. Can Katherine do a studio visit or at least a video call?
adminNotes: High value lead — follow up for site visit

replies.body: Dear David, thank you so much for reaching out about your Austin project. Katherine would love to discuss the hotel commission. She is available for a studio visit the week of June 16. Please let me know what works for your schedule and I'll coordinate.

name: Sarah & Tom Whitfield
message: We are buying a housewarming gift for close friends. They have a beach house in Galveston and we think one of Katherine's coastal pieces would be perfect. Budget is around $3,000–$4,500. What would you recommend?
adminNotes: Sold Coastal Light I — happy customers

replies.body: Hello Sarah and Tom! What a thoughtful gift. For a beach house in Galveston, I'd strongly recommend 'Coastal Light I' — it's 36×48 and captures that Gulf Coast dusk light perfectly. It's $4,800 and available now. I can have it shipped with museum-quality packaging. Let me know if you'd like to move forward!
